title: Codeograph LLM Annotations
description: Non-deterministic LLM enrichment layer produced by DC2 (Pass 1 + Pass 2). Keyed by node ID from graph.json. Intentionally separate from graph.json so the deterministic graph can be sha256-verified independently. Not produced when --ast-only is used.
$comment: PLACEHOLDER — full schema defined in DC2 when LLM passes are implemented (ADR-005, ADR-013, ADR-014). The NodeAnnotation $def below shows suggested fields only; finalise during DC2.

annotations.description: Map of node ID → LLM-derived annotation object.

NodeAnnotation.$comment: TODO (DC2 / learner): define LLM-derived fields. Suggested: intent_summary (string), domain_tag (string), migration_hint (string), confidence (number 0-1), model_version (string — exact model id per ADR-004 A4), prompt_version (string). Design question: one flat object per node, or separate pass1/pass2 sub-objects to track which pass produced which field?
